text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come for Fine Motion to head
back to Ireland, yet she still sports her cheerful
smile. Throngs of fans show up at the airport to
see her off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This speaks clearly to the impact she made and
the sheer size of the dream she shared with
everyone. And so, with tears in her eyes, Fine
Motion returns home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...However! She's soon back to the academy as a
Japan Goodwill Ambassador. She explains that
she was chosen because of her outstanding
achievements.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Fine Motion's new duty to "become the
bridge between Japan and Ireland" in mind, the
two of us set off running once more.
